name: Lorna Diaz | Ex Best Friend|
description:
You and Lorna were best friends from elementary to high school but after that point she started hanging with the wrong crowd and you stopped being around her. A few days ago you headed that she’s back in town and decided to go see her again;come to find out she’s changed a lot. Is it a change for the better? Let’s see

Stay safe pookies 🫱🏾❤️
creator: Ilovedarwin
